scripts.firebase:emulators:smoke: npx --yes firebase-tools@latest emulators:exec --project demo-mcp-miner --only auth,firestore,functions "node scripts/firebase_emulator_smoke.js"
scripts.firebase:auth:smoke: npx --yes firebase-tools@latest emulators:exec --project demo-mcp-miner --only auth,firestore "node scripts/firebase_auth_linking_smoke.js"
scripts.firebase:sync:smoke: npx --yes firebase-tools@latest emulators:exec --project demo-mcp-miner --only auth,firestore,functions "node scripts/firebase_sync_api_smoke.js"
scripts.firebase:dashboard:smoke: npx --yes firebase-tools@latest emulators:exec --project demo-mcp-miner --only auth,firestore,functions,hosting "node scripts/firebase_dashboard_smoke.js"
scripts.firebase:integration:smoke: npx --yes firebase-tools@latest emulators:exec --project demo-mcp-miner --only auth,firestore,functions,hosting "node scripts/firebase_integration_smoke.js"
scripts.test:firebase-js: node --check scripts/firebase_emulator_smoke.js && node --check scripts/firebase_firestore_rules_smoke.js && node --check scripts/firebase_auth_linking_smoke.js && node --check scripts/firebase_sync_api_smoke.js && node --check scripts/firebase_dashboard_smoke.js && node --check scripts/firebase_integration_smoke.js && node --check firebase/functions/src/sync.js && node --check firebase/hosting/auth.js && npm --prefix firebase/functions run lint
scripts.check: npm run validate:data && npm run test:validator && npm run validate:plugin && npm run test:firebase-config && npm run test:firebase-js && npm run test:firestore-schema && npm run test:auth-linking && npm run test:dashboard && npm run test:firebase-integration && npm run test:cloud-sync-api && npm run test:cloud-sync-client && npm run test:mcp && npm run test:migrations && npm run test:orders && npm run test:store && npm run test:market && npm run test:upgrades && npm run test:asteroids && npm run test:fabrication && npm run test:base && npm run test:profile && npm run test:weekly && npm run test:reward-controls && npm run test:hooks
